info.name: رابطة سوق السيارات — Car Marketplace API
info.description:
Complete REST API collection for the Car Marketplace project (mobile app + admin dashboard).

Every response follows the same envelope: `{ success, message, data, meta, errors }`.

Set `base_url` to your running server (e.g. http://localhost:8000/api). `mobile_url` = {{base_url}}/v1/mobile, `admin_url` = {{base_url}}/admin, `core_url` = {{base_url}}/core.

Login requests (Mobile > Auth > Login, Admin > Auth > Admin Login) have test scripts that auto-populate `mobile_token` / `admin_token` from the response, so every other request's Bearer auth works immediately after logging in.

`sort_by=price_desc` on List Cars / Home / Search demonstrates descending-price sorting; the full sort_by enum is newest | oldest | price_asc | price_desc | mileage_asc.

item.name: 🌍 Core
App Config (Maintenance / Version Gate)

header.description: Always request JSON; every response in this API follows the unified envelope shape.
ar or en. Controls which bilingual field (_ar/_en) mobile resources localize to.

query.description: The app's current installed version, for min_version comparison.

item.description: Public endpoint mobile clients poll on launch to check maintenance mode and forced-upgrade requirements.

item.name: Terms & Conditions

header.description: Always request JSON; every response in this API follows the unified envelope shape.
ar or en. Controls which bilingual field (_ar/_en) mobile resources localize to.

item.description: Public, locale-aware. Returns the ordered list of policy/terms sections, localized via Accept-Language.
Fully public endpoints with no auth, used for app-level configuration and legal content.

item.name: 📱 Mobile
Auth
Register

header.description: Always request JSON; every response in this API follows the unified envelope shape.
ar or en. Controls which bilingual field (_ar/_en) mobile resources localize to.
Raw JSON body.

item.description:
Creates a new user account and returns a Bearer token. Public. Rate-limited (10/min/IP via the mobile-auth throttle group).

Body fields:
- `name`: Full name.
- `email`: Must be unique among non-deleted users.
- `phone`: Must be unique among non-deleted users.
- `password`: Min 8 chars, mixed case, at least one number.
- `password_confirmation`: Must match password.
- `fcm_token`: Optional. Registers this device for push notifications immediately on signup.

item.name: Login

header.description: Always request JSON; every response in this API follows the unified envelope shape.
ar or en. Controls which bilingual field (_ar/_en) mobile resources localize to.
Raw JSON body.

item.description:
Authenticates an existing user and returns a Bearer token. Public. Fails for inactive (banned) accounts.

Body fields:
- `email`: Registered email.
- `password`: Account password.

item.name: Send OTP

header.description: Always request JSON; every response in this API follows the unified envelope shape.
ar or en. Controls which bilingual field (_ar/_en) mobile resources localize to.
Raw JSON body.

item.description:
Sends a 4-digit OTP code (5-minute expiry) to the given email for identity verification. Same OTP mechanism backs forgot-password.

Body fields:
- `email`: Email to send the OTP to.

item.name: Verify OTP

header.description: Always request JSON; every response in this API follows the unified envelope shape.
ar or en. Controls which bilingual field (_ar/_en) mobile resources localize to.
Raw JSON body.

item.description:
Verifies a previously-sent OTP code.

Body fields:
- `email`: Email the OTP was sent to.
- `otp`: The 4-digit code.

item.name: Forgot Password

header.description: Always request JSON; every response in this API follows the unified envelope shape.
ar or en. Controls which bilingual field (_ar/_en) mobile resources localize to.
Raw JSON body.

item.description:
Step 1 of the 3-step reset flow: sends an OTP to the given email. Throttled to 6 requests/minute/IP. Always responds success even for unknown emails (does not leak account existence).

Body fields:
- `email`: Email to send the reset OTP to.

item.name: Verify Reset OTP

header.description: Always request JSON; every response in this API follows the unified envelope shape.
ar or en. Controls which bilingual field (_ar/_en) mobile resources localize to.
Raw JSON body.

item.description:
Step 2: verifies the OTP and returns a short-lived reset_token used in step 3. Throttled 6/min/IP; locks out after repeated wrong attempts.

Body fields:
- `email`: Email the OTP was sent to.
- `otp`: The 4-digit code from Forgot Password.

item.name: Reset Password

header.description: Always request JSON; every response in this API follows the unified envelope shape.
ar or en. Controls which bilingual field (_ar/_en) mobile resources localize to.
Raw JSON body.

item.description:
Step 3: sets a new password using the reset_token from Verify Reset OTP.

Body fields:
- `email`: Same email used in the previous steps.
- `reset_token`: Token returned by Verify Reset OTP.
- `password`: New password, min 8 chars mixed case + number.
- `password_confirmation`: Must match password.

item.name: Logout

header.description: Always request JSON; every response in this API follows the unified envelope shape.
ar or en. Controls which bilingual field (_ar/_en) mobile resources localize to.

item.description: Revokes the current Bearer token. Auth required.
Public registration/login/OTP/password-reset endpoints, plus authenticated logout. All under the mobile-auth rate limiter (10/min/IP).

item.name: List Cars

header.description: Always request JSON; every response in this API follows the unified envelope shape.
ar or en. Controls which bilingual field (_ar/_en) mobile resources localize to.

query.description: sedan | suv | hatchback | coupe | pickup | van | other.
true to only show cars with an uploaded inspection report.
newest (default) | oldest | price_asc | price_desc | mileage_asc. Use price_desc to sort highest price first.

item.description: Public browsing of ACTIVE cars only, with the full filter/sort set.

item.name: Show Car

header.description: Always request JSON; every response in this API follows the unified envelope shape.
ar or en. Controls which bilingual field (_ar/_en) mobile resources localize to.

item.description: Returns full details of a single ACTIVE car (404 for any other status) and increments its views_count. Auth optional — enriches is_favorited when a token is present.

item.name: Search Cars

header.description: Always request JSON; every response in this API follows the unified envelope shape.
ar or en. Controls which bilingual field (_ar/_en) mobile resources localize to.

item.description: Dedicated free-text search across active cars. `q` is required and must be at least 2 characters.
Public browsing/discovery surface. List Cars supports the full filter set including sort_by=price_desc for a descending-price view.

item.name: Favorites
Toggle Favorite (Like/Unlike)

header.description: Always request JSON; every response in this API follows the unified envelope shape.
ar or en. Controls which bilingual field (_ar/_en) mobile resources localize to.

item.description: Adds the car to the user's favorites if not already favorited, or removes it if it is — a single idempotent 'like/unlike' toggle. Returns {added: true|false}. Auth required.

item.name: List Favorites

header.description: Always request JSON; every response in this API follows the unified envelope shape.
ar or en. Controls which bilingual field (_ar/_en) mobile resources localize to.

item.description: Paginated list of the authenticated user's favorited (liked) cars.
"Like/unlike" a car listing. There is one toggle endpoint (POST /favorites/{car}) rather than separate like/unlike routes — calling it again reverses the previous state.

item.name: Submit/Update Car Rating

header.description: Always request JSON; every response in this API follows the unified envelope shape.
ar or en. Controls which bilingual field (_ar/_en) mobile resources localize to.
Raw JSON body.

item.description:
Creates the user's rating for this car, or replaces their existing one (one rating per user per car). Recalculates the car's rating_avg. Auth required.

Body fields:
- `rating`: Integer 1-5.
- `comment`: Optional, max 500 chars.
Star ratings + optional comment, one per user per car (upsert semantics).

item.name: Bookings
Create Booking

header.description: Always request JSON; every response in this API follows the unified envelope shape.
ar or en. Controls which bilingual field (_ar/_en) mobile resources localize to.
Raw JSON body.

item.description:
Books a service at a center for a future date/time. 422 if the user already has a pending/confirmed booking at the same center on the same date. car_id is optional and, if given, must be one of the user's own individual listings.

Body fields:
- `maintenance_center_id`: Required, must exist.
- `maintenance_service_id`: Required, must belong to the given center.
- `car_id`: Optional. If set, must be a car owned by the authenticated user.
- `date`: Required, must be a future date (after today).
- `time`: Required, H:i 24-hour format.
- `notes`: Optional, max 500 chars.

item.name: Cancel Booking

header.description: Always request JSON; every response in this API follows the unified envelope shape.

Raw JSON body.

item.description:
Cancels the booking. Only the owner or an admin may cancel. 422 if the booking isn't pending/confirmed.

Body fields:
- `cancellation_reason`: Optional, max 300 chars.
Maintenance-center booking lifecycle: create → (admin confirms/completes) → optionally cancel.

In-app notification center, mirrored to FCM push on creation. 8 notification types: car_match, showroom_reply, booking_confirmed, booking_cancelled, price_drop, listing_approved, listing_rejected, car_available.

item.name: Watch Requests
Watch Car (Notify Me)

header.description: Always request JSON; every response in this API follows the unified envelope shape.
ar or en. Controls which bilingual field (_ar/_en) mobile resources localize to.

item.description: Registers a "notify me" request for this car's brand+model. 422 if the car isn't sold — you can only watch a brand/model after seeing it sold out. Upserts if already watching.

item.name: Unwatch Car

header.description: Always request JSON; every response in this API follows the unified envelope shape.
ar or en. Controls which bilingual field (_ar/_en) mobile resources localize to.

item.name: List My Watch Requests

header.description: Always request JSON; every response in this API follows the unified envelope shape.
ar or en. Controls which bilingual field (_ar/_en) mobile resources localize to.

item.description: Returns all of the authenticated user's watch requests with localized brand/model names.
"Notify me" for sold-out brand/model combinations. When a matching car goes active, a car_available notification is dispatched via a queued job.

Consumed by the Flutter mobile app. Base path /api/v1/mobile. Auth is optional-by-default at the group level (auth.optional middleware resolves the user if a valid token is present, without rejecting guests), with auth:sanctum required on specific authenticated routes.

item.name: 🛡️ Admin
Auth
Admin Login

header.description: Always request JSON; every response in this API follows the unified envelope shape.
ar or en. Controls which bilingual field (_ar/_en) mobile resources localize to.
Raw JSON body.

item.description:
Authenticates an admin (must have the admin role — non-admin credentials are rejected even if the password is correct) and returns a Bearer token. Public.

Body fields:
- `email`: Admin account email.
- `password`: Admin account password.

header.description: Always request JSON; every response in this API follows the unified envelope shape.

item.description: Returns the authenticated admin's profile. Requires a valid Sanctum token (role check not required for this route).

item.name: Admin Logout

header.description: Always request JSON; every response in this API follows the unified envelope shape.
ar or en. Controls which bilingual field (_ar/_en) mobile resources localize to.

item.description: Revokes the current admin Bearer token.
Admin auth is a SEPARATE login flow from mobile, but issues tokens against the SAME users table — the only difference is AdminAuthService re-checks the admin role before issuing a token.

item.name: Create Car

header.description: Always request JSON; every response in this API follows the unified envelope shape.
ar or en. Controls which bilingual field (_ar/_en) mobile resources localize to.

formdata.description: cash | installment | both. Optional, defaults to cash.
new | used. Optional, defaults to used.
Required: sedan | suv | hatchback | coupe | pickup | van | other.
Optional, up to 10 gallery images (jpeg/png/webp, max 5MB each).

item.description:
Creates a new admin-listed car (seller is forced to admin/null in Phase 1). Accepts gallery images and an inspection report file alongside the JSON fields (multipart/form-data).

Body fields (multipart/form-data):
- `brand_id`: Required, must exist.
- `car_model_id`: Required, must exist.
- `city_id`: Required, must exist.
- `color_id`: Optional.
- `year`: Required, 4 digits.
- `title_ar`: Required.
- `title_en`: Optional.
- `description_ar`: Optional.
- `description_en`: Optional.
- `price`: Required.
- `payment_type`: cash | installment | both. Optional, defaults to cash.
- `mileage`: Optional.
- `condition`: new | used. Optional, defaults to used.
- `transmission`: Required: automatic | manual.
- `fuel_type`: Required: petrol | diesel | electric | hybrid.
- `body_type`: Required: sedan | suv | hatchback | coupe | pickup | van | other.
- `owners_count`: Optional, defaults to 1.
- `images[]`: Optional, up to 10 gallery images (jpeg/png/webp, max 5MB each).
- `inspection_file`: Optional inspection report (jpeg/png/pdf, max 10MB).

item.name: Update Car Status

header.description: Always request JSON; every response in this API follows the unified envelope shape.
ar or en. Controls which bilingual field (_ar/_en) mobile resources localize to.
Raw JSON body.

item.description:
Changes the car's lifecycle status. rejection_reason is required when status=rejected. Approving to active dispatches SendWatchNotificationsJob for matching watch requests.

Body fields:
- `status`: active | pending | needs_inspection | rejected | sold.
- `rejection_reason`: Required only when status=rejected.
Full car listing lifecycle management, including the 5-state status workflow (active/pending/needs_inspection/rejected/sold).

header.description: Always request JSON; every response in this API follows the unified envelope shape.
ar or en. Controls which bilingual field (_ar/_en) mobile resources localize to.

item.description: Read-only, paginated overview of watch-request demand grouped by brand+model: watchers_count and latest_request_at per group, most-watched first. Useful for deciding what inventory to source.
Aggregated view of what buyers are waiting for.

Consumed by the Angular admin dashboard. Base path /api/admin. Every route requires auth:sanctum, and every route except auth/login and auth/me|logout additionally requires the 'admin' role middleware (double protection).

variable.description: Root API URL, no trailing slash.
Bearer token for the mobile app, auto-set by Login's test script.
Bearer token for the admin dashboard, auto-set by Admin Login's test script.
Short-lived token from Verify Reset OTP, used by Reset Password.
ar or en, sent as Accept-Language on every request.
